headline: Another airline cancels flights until August, travelers to get refunds

headline: Joby Aviation Nears Air Taxi Launch As FAA Progress Meets Partner Plans
summary: Joby Aviation (NYSE:JOBY) has begun maiden flights of its FAA conforming aircraft as it prepares for commercial air taxi services. The company is progressing under the FAA's eVTOL Integration Pilot Program, marking a shift from development toward operational readiness. Partnerships with Uber and Delta Airlines are part of Joby's plan to build out future air taxi networks and customer access. Joby Aviation, listed as NYSE:JOBY, focuses on electric vertical takeoff and landing aircraft aimed...
